theme_identity.name: Tropical Pop Italian Riviera Summer 2026
theme_identity.vibe: Audace, festoso, da apericena, solare, fresco.

silhouettes.strategy: Overlay decorative absolute positioned elements (SVG or Ionicons) across screens to ensure a summery feel.

elements.name: Onde
elements.placement: Bottom edges of screens or cards as repeating patterns.

elements.name: Sole
elements.placement: Behind the main hero banners or top center of dashboard.

elements.name: Ombrellone
elements.placement: Scattered in background of Shop and Booking screens.

elements.name: Occhiali da sole
elements.placement: Decorative corner accents in Altro grid.

login.style: WOW estivo. Background gradientPrimary. Huge 'sunny' silhouette watermark centered behind the login card. Card is stark white with rounded corners (24px) and soft shadow.

home_dashboard.header: Subtle sun-ray gradient. Silhouette of palm trees top-right.
home_dashboard.kpi_banner: White card, Azzurro primary metrics. Streak uses Fuchsia (#FF1493) to pop.

class_booking.calendar: Current day highlighted in Banana Yellow (#FFEA00).
class_booking.slots: Available: White with Azzurro border. Full: Light gray with crossed umbrella silhouette.

wheel_quiz.wheel: Sections use full Tropical Pop palette: Cyan, Fuchsia, Yellow, Lime.
wheel_quiz.background: Scattered silhouettes: stars, ice creams, flamingos.

ask_master.layout: Chat bubbles: Azzurro for Master, Fuchsia/Light blue for user. Sarcastic tone maintained with tropical aesthetic.

shop.cards: Summery, clean. 24px border radius. Buy buttons in Lime Green or Azzurro.

altro_grid.cards: 7 cards with soft borders, each featuring a faint 10% opacity silhouette icon corresponding to the feature.

leaderboard.podium: 1st: Yellow/Gold, 2nd: Cyan, 3rd: Fuchsia. Fun, summery energetic feel.

popups.style: Modal content centered. 24px radius. Large Azzurro Mare CTA button for WhatsApp.

rules: Keep all Italian text strictly unchanged.
Implement design tokens mapped to React Native StyleSheet objects.
Use @expo/vector-icons (Ionicons) configured as absolute positioned layers for the silhouettes.
Avoid raw CSS. Map to RN properties (e.g. shadowColor, shadowOffset, shadowOpacity).
Include testID="[kebab-case-name]" on all interactive elements to comply with testing rules.
